title: Specklinia auriculata
taxonomy: Specklinia auriculata is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to South America and belongs to the genus Specklinia, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. The classification of Specklinia auriculata is further divided into its kingdom (Plantae), phylum (Angiospermophyta), and class (Liliopsida), with its order (Asparagales) and family (Orchidaceae) also being relevant in its classification. Specklinia auriculata's classification is based on its physical characteristics and genetic makeup. The species is also known by its synonym, Pleurothallis auriculata.

This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
